title: Chapter 168
content:
Chapter 167

Mira’s pussy clenched hard around my dick as she came violently, practically going into a seizure as her pussy tightened so much around me that I felt the supply of mana was about to be cut off.

I didn’t slow down. I couldn’t slow down. While I was unable to pull myself out fully, I kept hitting her uterus by moving my hips and came inside of her.

The ejaculation was pure torture, and pain was obviously mixed in. I had never held myself back for this long. Not to mention, the surrounding tightness was a world of pain as well. No matter how soft her pussy was, with how tight it was, it was nothing but pure pleasure, and sometimes, too much pleasure cannot be a good thing.

Haa… Haa…

I breathed heavily once I finished milking all of my cum inside of Mira, and I could feel her stomach had bloated a little. It wasn’t just because of my dick either. I had cum that much inside of her.

I turned to look at Valeria, who was kneeling beside the couch, and was struck with grief at how I couldn’t finish inside of her.

I didn’t know why, but I made a stupid decision at that moment. Fully aware that my lie could be exposed, I still activated the state of completion again, bringing my dick back to life, and pulled Valeria onto the couch, her back against the couch back and her ass spilling at the edge of the couch.

Before she could react, I slammed my dick into her, bringing my hands to her massive ass again and practically thrusting like a relentless machine.

She moaned out loud in my ear, her arms around my neck, as I soon felt my orgasm approaching inside of her soft and tight pussy.

I didn’t push back this time and came inside of her as soon as my orgasm reached its peak, flooding her inside with a little lesser amount than Mira’s, but still enough to cause her pussy to overflow, and as soon as I pulled out, a gush followed, mixed with both our juices.

“Haaa… Haaa…”

We took deep breaths again, and once reality set in, a voice also fell in my ears, “Fascinating. Twice in a row.”

Fuck.

~~

Since the beginning of time, most of the problems men had faced, or had gotten into, were because of their dicks. In other words, their lust.

I wouldn’t get into too much detail, but there were examples throughout history to support that statement.

Even most of the problems I had faced were solely because of this too. Like this one time when I was in the Murim world and the emperor’s wife, who was a total bombshell, and had invoked my lust to the point that I snuck into her quarters at night and, while she thought I was her husband, fucked her in the darkness.

The morning brought anger from the emperor as the empress blushed and said that the previous night was wonderful and that she was expecting to give him another child after his vigorous performance, which he had never done before.

An investigation was started immediately, and it was deduced that no one other than a martial artist could have done that.

All martial artists, those who weren’t affiliated with the empire in the entire capital, were arrested and executed the same day.

The people of Jianghu didn’t like that, and a bloody battle took place. Soon, the unorthodox faction joined, making it a three-way battle, and then the demonic faction also appeared from the hundred thousand mountains, making it a full-fledged war.

All because I couldn’t hold myself after watching the busty and amazing empress, who was amazingly hot and tight.

A war for a mature pussy. I never regretted that choice of mine.

Sure, millions died, and then more, but ultimately, the only one who benefited from that was me. Of course, before I could fully reap my benefits, I was transferred to another world the next day, into another weak body, beginning everything from the next day.

And then in the noble world, how the father of the body I was living in at that time went to war and returned to find all of his legal wives and concubines pregnant, his daughters, his other children’s wives, along with their maids, and almost all the maids of the mansion bearing my children.

He went ballistic.

Of course, I killed him. And then his brother came after me, a duke. I killed him too, and that caused a power vacuum in the kingdom I was a part of at that time, causing another way to erupt.

All because my stepmother at that time was vulnerable one night, and I fucked her to my heart’s content, making a mess out of her, and was unlucky enough to be caught by the noble’s second wife, and had to fuck her too.

Since I had fucked his first and second wife, I thought I wouldn’t be unfair to the third wife, who was also my mother at the time and quite discontent with her status as the third wife, so I fucked her and made it so she was on equal terms with the other two, since all three had been turned into equal sluts by me.

Then their daughters followed.

Then the concubines followed, and then their daughters, and then I thought, why not the rest of the women? Like the wives of the knights and soldiers who had followed the noble to battle, and the maids of the mansion.

Anyway, long story short, my lust got the better of me then too.

And then again in another world.

And then in another world.

And then in another world.

I never learned my lesson. No matter the world and the consequences, I’m telling you my lust always got the better of me when there was someone of my preference before me.

And that was exactly how I ended up in this situation.

Valeria and Mira were dismissed by Elara. Well, Valeria was, and she had to carry the passed-out Mira with her.

Once we were alone, there was nothing but silence as I stood before Elara, fully dressed.

Elara looked at me in silence before she finally broke it by saying, “Catherine visited me this morning before I called for you.”

Huh?

I wonder why?

“She told me what happened between you and her last night. And while I could feel some changes in her, she was not pleased with you and my daughter, on whose orders you were acting.”

“Since my husband is away currently, she approached me to complain, and had you beheaded for laying your hands on her.”

Gulp…

“Worry not. I handled it. She’s calm now, and once she observes the changes in her, she’ll forget it.”

Then what the hell was the problem?

“But there was something in her testimony that I found strange. So, just to be sure, I called my daughter too, and had her explain her encounter with you to me.”

“While she did say the same as you in the beginning, according to her, recently, you can perform that ejaculating action multiple times in a row, not just a few times a day with breaks.”

Crap. She knew from the beginning.

I was too deep in enemy territory to escape, at least with my family. And fighting was not an option because I couldn’t feel how strong Elara really was. I could tell Carlson was strong. Many times stronger than the S-rank knight I met at the noble district of the capital, but when it came to Elara, I had no idea.

So, the only option was to…

“Forgive me, my lady!”

To grovel.

I immediately fell and kowtowed before her, explaining like a helpless and scared commoner who feared for his life, “I didn’t mean to deceive you! I was just afraid I would be imprisoned and used for the rest of my life! Forgive me! Please! Forgive me!”

There was silence for some time in the room, while I remained on the floor just like that.

All of a sudden, however, I felt a pull. Like something was pulling me. Something invisible.

Telekinesis.

I was pulled up in the air, facing Elara, with no control over my body. And that was when I saw something horrifying.

Elara was simply sitting in her seat, with no movements of her hands. She wasn’t even pointing her hands at me as a show of her using magic.

Because she wasn’t.

This wasn’t telekinesis. Elara was keeping me in the air with raw mana alone. And it wasn’t even her hands that were controlling mana.

It was her eyes.

She was strong enough to control mana with her eyes. That was not something a seventh circle mage could do. At least eight, and a ninth circle was a must for someone to do it this casually.

And that was the confusing point. I thought this world wasn’t advanced enough to go beyond the seventh circle, or the S rank, in layman’s terms. Carlson was an S rank, the top of the S ranks, or the seventh rank, while the knight at the gate was at the initial stages.

But Elara. She was at the beginning of the ninth circle at the very least. And if she were at more…

Gulp.

I couldn’t even resist that thought. It would be futile.

But before I could get into any more of it, I was pushed back and slammed into the couch on which I had just fucked Elara’s maids.

And then she stood up. And for the first time, I saw her without her sitting on that chair.

And…

Damn, she was tall.
